headline: Is Vistra (VST) Still Attractive After Its 50.6% One Year Share Price Jump
summary: Wondering if Vistra at around US$159.60 is still a worthwhile idea or if the easy gains are behind it? This article breaks down what the current price might be saying about value. The stock has had a mixed run, with a 0.9% move over the last week, 9.3% over the last month, a year to date return of 3.4% decline, and a 50.6% return over the last year. It therefore makes sense to ask what is already reflected in the share price. Recent coverage has focused on Vistra's position in the utilities...
